Lionel Messi Wears Indian Cricket Jersey in Viral Adidas Shoot

Dec 19, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Lionel Messi Sparks Global Buzz With Indian Cricket Jersey Moment

Lionel Messi stunned fans worldwide after appearing in an Indian cricket team jersey with Kuldeep Yadav during a viral Adidas photoshoot, uniting football and cricket fandoms.
